hero.title: Space Jam
hero.reason: In honor of National Space Day, a fun-filled day to appreciate the wonders of space and our favorite athletes who have taken their talents to new heights, or in this case, new courts.
hero.blurb: Get ready to slam dunk with Michael Jordan and the Looney Tunes gang in this out-of-this-world sports comedy. A fun film for the whole family, Space Jam is a classic that never gets old.

released.title: Spider-Man 3
released.reason: Released today in 2007, this film marks a pivotal moment in the Spider-Man franchise, with Tobey Maguire reprising his role as the web-slinging hero and facing off against a new villain.
released.blurb: The third installment of the Spider-Man trilogy brings even more action and excitement, with Spider-Man facing off against the Sandman and Venom. With stunning visuals and thrilling fight scenes, this film is a must-see for fans of the series.

birthday.title: Lone Star
birthday.reason: Happy birthday to Elizabeth Peña, born May 2, 1961, a talented actress who brought depth and nuance to her roles, including this critically acclaimed drama.
birthday.blurb: This powerful film explores themes of identity, community, and social justice, with a talented ensemble cast. Elizabeth Peña shines in her role, bringing warmth and authenticity to the story.

awful.title: The Happening
awful.reason: A famously bad movie with terrible reviews, The Happening is a laughable disaster that will leave you questioning the sanity of the filmmakers.
awful.blurb: With a ridiculous plot, cringe-worthy dialogue, and over-the-top performances, this film is a masterpiece of bad cinema. If you're looking for a guilty pleasure or a movie to mock with friends, The Happening is the perfect choice.
